cases.name: batch-block
cases.desc: Two records under one commit form one atomic block

cases.name: escaped-etb-not-commit
cases.desc: DLE-escaped ETB is data; nothing is committed

cases.name: etb-in-scope-not-commit
cases.desc: ETB inside an STX/ETX scope is record content, not a commit

cases.name: payload-in-committed-region
cases.desc: ETB payload extends committed_end but is excluded from the block

cases.name: empty-stream
cases.desc: Empty buffer: no commits, not torn
